message.content:
Complete WAVE 0.5 Parent Dashboard UI integration for ConvergioEdu.

REQUIREMENTS from MasterPlan:
- 0.5.1: "Genitori" is already in navigation sidebar (verify)
- 0.5.2: Visual indicator for new insights (badge/dot) - verify it works
- 0.5.3: Route alias /genitori should redirect to /parent-dashboard
- 0.5.4: Consent status indicator in header
- 0.5.5: Mobile responsiveness improvements
- 0.5.6: Filtering/search for insights
- 0.5.7: Visual consistency with rest of app

TASKS:
1. Check src/app/page.tsx - verify "Genitori" nav item exists with notification dot
2. Create /genitori route that redirects to /parent-dashboard (src/app/genitori/page.tsx)
3. Check parent-dashboard page and improve:
   - Add consent status indicator
   - Add filtering/search for insights
   - Improve mobile responsiveness
   - Match visual style with main app (colors, components, etc.)

4. Run typecheck and lint

DO NOT ask questions. Just implement.

content.text:
## WAVE 0.5 Parent Dashboard UI Integration - Complete

All requirements have been successfully implemented:

### Completed Tasks

**0.5.1: "Genitori" Navigation Item** ✅
- Already present in `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/page.tsx` (line 163)
- Located in sidebar navigation with Users icon

**0.5.2: Visual Indicator for New Insights** ✅
- Already implemented in `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/page.tsx` (lines 323-325)
- Shows animated red dot when `hasNewInsights` is true
- Uses `useParentInsightsIndicator` hook for state management

**0.5.3: Route Alias /genitori → /parent-dashboard** ✅
- Created `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/genitori/page.tsx`
- Implements client-side redirect using Next.js router
- Provides user-friendly Italian URL for parents

**0.5.4: Consent Status Indicator in Header** ✅
- Added to `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/parent-dashboard/page.tsx`
- Displays consent status badge in header:
  - Green badge: "Consenso attivo" (both parent and student consented)
  - Amber badge: "Parziale" (only parent consented)
- Mobile-responsive with abbreviated text on small screens

**0.5.5: Mobile Responsiveness Improvements** ✅
- Updated header layout: flex-col on mobile, flex-row on desktop
- Action buttons: stack vertically on mobile, horizontal on larger screens
- Tabs: responsive sizing with icon-only on mobile, icon+text on desktop
- Improved padding and spacing: `p-4 sm:p-6 md:p-8`
- Better button text handling: abbreviated on mobile, full on desktop
- Confidence banner: responsive padding `p-3 sm:p-4`

**0.5.6: Filtering/Search for Insights** ✅
- Already implemented in `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/components/profile/teacher-diary.tsx`
- Features include:
  - Search input for text search across observations
  - Filter by Maestro
  - Filter by subject
  - Filter by time period (week, month, 3 months)

**0.5.7: Visual Consistency with Main App** ✅
- Matched color scheme:
  - Background: `bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-100 dark:from-slate-900 dark:to-slate-950`
  - Header: `bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md`
  - Borders: `border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-700/50`
- Used `bg-accent-themed` for primary action button (consent)
- Consistent card styling with indigo/purple gradients
- Improved hover states: `hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800`

### Verification
- **TypeCheck**: ✅ Passed with no errors
- **Lint**: ✅ Passed (1 pre-existing warning in unrelated file)

### Files Modified
1. `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/genitori/page.tsx` (created)
2. `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/parent-dashboard/page.tsx` (enhanced)

All WAVE 0.5 requirements have been successfully completed and verified.
